name: Rice & Corn Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken or turkey (giblets, use few or no; livers)
Optional: Poultry seasoning, sage, and garlic powder to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions.
2. Cook giblets in salted water until tender, cool, then chop or grind. Reserve the broth.
3. Sauté celery, onion, and bell pepper until the celery is limp (can be easily smashed between thumb and forefinger).
4. Add seasonings except Worcestershire sauce. Simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Add Worcestershire sauce and corn. Simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Combine rice and vegetable mixtures.
7. Add chopped giblets and mix well. Use broth to moisten, if necessary.
8. Stuff the turkey and cook as usual. If stuffing wild ducks or geese, do not stuff until the last 15 to 30 minutes of cooking time.
